creator: gjb@FreeBSD.org
text: It was closed because there will not be a BEAGLEBONE image for 12.2-RELEASE.  If you can test the 12.2-STABLE image you linked to, that would be great.  As I understand it, the excessively-long I/O issue is not present in 13-CURRENT, but it would definitely be nice to have this tracked down before 12.3-RELEASE when the time comes.
